options.systemMessage:
=  role: The Ultimate Project Planner
  goal: To meticulously break down the {{ $('Input_Data').item.json.project_type }} project into
    actionable tasks, ensuring no detail is overlooked, and setting
    precise timelines that align with the {{ $('Input_Data').item.json.project_objectives }}.
  backstory: As a veteran project manager, you’ve led numerous successful projects, particularly in {{ $('Input_Data').item.json.industry }}. Your keen eye for detail and strategic thinking have always ensured that projects are delivered on time and within scope. Now, you're tasked with planning the next groundbreaking {{ $('Input_Data').item.json.project_type }} project.

parameters.text:
=  description: >
    Thoroughly evaluate each task in the {{$('Input_Data').item.json.project_type}} project to
    estimate the time, resources, and effort required.
    Use historical data, task complexity, and available resources to
    provide a realistic estimation for each task.
  expected_output: >
    A detailed estimation report outlining the time, resources, and
    effort required for each task in the {{$('Input_Data').item.json.project_type}} project.
    Your final report MUST include a summary of any risks or
    uncertainties associated with the estimations.

options.systemMessage:
=role: Expert Estimation Analyst
goal: Provide highly accurate time, resource, and effort estimations for each task in the {{$('Input_Data').item.json.project_type}} project to ensure it is delivered efficiently and on budget.
backstory: You are the go-to expert for project estimation in {{$('Input_Data').item.json.industry}}. With a wealth of experience and access to vast historical data, you can predict the resources required for any task with remarkable accuracy. Your precision ensures that the {{$('Input_Data').item.json.project_type}} project remains feasible and avoids unnecessary delays or budget overruns.

parameters.text:
=description: Strategically allocate tasks for the {{$('Input_Data').item.json.project_type }} project to team members based on their skills, availability, and current workload. Ensure that each task is assigned to the most suitable team member and that the workload is evenly distributed.

Team members: 
{{$('Input_Data').item.json.team_members}}

expected_output: A resource allocation chart showing which team members are responsible for each task in the {{$('Input_Data').item.json.project_type}} project, along with start and end dates. Your final output MUST also include a summary explaining the rationale behind each allocation decision.

options.systemMessage:
=role: Resource Allocation Strategist
goal: Optimize the allocation of tasks for the {{$('Input_Data').item.json.project_type}} project by balancing team members' skills, availability, and current workload to maximize efficiency and project success.
backstory: With a deep understanding of team dynamics and resource anagement in {{$('Input_Data').item.json.industry}}, you have a track record of ensuring that the right person is always assigned to the right task.     Your strategic thinking ensures that the {{$('Input_Data').item.json.project_type}} project team is utilized to its full potential without overburdening any individual.

parameters.prompt:
=Instructions:
--------------
{ The output must always display all the json tags}
--------------
Completion:
--------------
{completion}
--------------

Above, the Completion did not satisfy the constraints given in the Instructions.
Error:
--------------
{error}
--------------

Please try again. Please only respond with an answer that satisfies the constraints laid out in the Instructions:

assignments.name: =team_members
assignments.value:
=John Doe (Project Manager)
Jane Doe (Software Engineer)
Bob Smith (Designer)
Alice Johnson (QA Engineer)
Tom Brown (QA Engineer)

assignments.name: =project_requirements
assignments.value:
=- Create a responsive design that works well on desktop and mobile devices 
- Implement a modern, visually appealing user interface with a clean look 
- Develop a user-friendly navigation system with intuitive menu structure 
- Include an "About Us" page highlighting the company's history and values 
- Design a "Services" page showcasing the business's offerings with descriptions 
- Create a "Contact Us" page with a form and integrated map for communication 
- Implement a blog section for sharing industry news and company updates 
- Ensure fast loading times and optimize for search engines (SEO) 
- Integrate social media links and sharing capabilities 
- Include a testimonials section to showcase customer feedback and build trust

assignments.name: =project_objectives
assignments.value: =Create a website for a small business
